metadata.title: Time Off | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered time off management platform for all your leave operations — from accrual plans and time off analysis to multi-step approvals and team availability tracking.

hero.title: Time off
hero.description: Manage leave requests, approvals, allocations, holidays, and team availability in one simple HR workspace.

dashboard.title: Time Off
dashboard.subtitle: My Time Off / Management / Reporting / Configuration

readySection.title: Always be ready
readySection.description: Customize leave types and absence forms so every request collects the right information from the start.

availabilitySection.title: See the breakdown of your available days
availabilitySection.subtitle: Do you have
availabilitySection.description: Know exactly how many days are available, planned, taken, and pending before an employee submits a request.

freedomSection.title: Freedom
freedomSection.titleHighlight: is only a few clicks away
freedomSection.description: Employees can submit a leave request in seconds. Managers get the context they need to approve or refuse without confusion.
freedomSection.requestLabel: Track your time on request move

reviewSection.title: Review,
reviewSection.description: Managers can review all requests from one dashboard, approve quickly, and keep the team calendar accurate.

features.title: Accrual plans
features.description: Customize accrual levels, allocation rules, and yearly leave calculations for your team.

features.title: Time off analysis
features.description: Analyze absences, balances, approvals, and team availability with clear reports.

features.title: Stress days
features.description: Configure company holidays, weekends, and unavailable days for better planning.

features.title: Multi-step approvals
features.description: Route requests through managers, HR teams, or custom approval flows.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: After realizing that our configured spreadsheets were not looking for an HR application, we found exactly what we needed with Adon Time Off.
testimonial.name: Laura Johnson
